author: Disney+ YouTube
text:
The Simpsons Extreme Makeover: Homer Edition | Disney+
It’s the summer of The Simpsons! Springfield’s finest family will have three all-new exclusive episodes on Disney+ starting with Extreme Makeover: Homer Edition, streaming June 17.

► SUBSCRIBE to the channel to get notified when new Disney+ videos are posted: https://www.youtube.com/disneyplus?sub_confirmation=1
